calendar.matters:
Notice Of Petition For Confirmation Of Arbitration Award And Entry Of Judgment; Memoradum Of P/A And Declaration In Support Of Motion
Off Calendar May-23-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEAR: Howard M. Hoffman, Esq. 916/368-6000 for petitioners & moving parties; Steven M. Green, Esq. 619/294-8571 for respondent & opposing party (matter heard during 9:30am morning session & continued to 4:00pm).
RULING: Argued and the Court grants the motion pursuant to stipulation of counsel. Order & judgment signed in open court. Mr. Green to have 90 days in which to bring motion for reconsideration; Mr. Hoffman agrees not to object on any procedural grounds, but may oppose as to substantive grounds; and Mr. Hoffman agrees to do nothing with judgment for 90 days. Mr. Hoffman to prepare order re above terms. (AJR/JH)
